entry.title: Re: scheduling agreement price condition report
entry.content:
Hi Sara,

I'm looking exactly for this report. Do you mind telling me if you found any solution?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: About structuring the Standard content in Extended Workarea in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

Just like custom content, it's best not to leave standard content under the Unsorted folder as well.  You can move the content out of the Unsorted folder by moving the Ariba Content out of Unsorted; this will also move all child objects at the same time.

It's up to you how you structure the standard content, primarily Simulations, but my personal preference would be to keep this content in a separate part of the content structure.  The benefit of this is that you are unlikely to use every standard object so it makes more sense to me to create a structure that contains your custom content and the standard content that you do want to use.

SAP Companion content can be moved into the same structure but is likely to be broken off into a different path very early in the structure.  For example, at a point very high in the content structure, you are likely to have a node for your content library and at the same level a node for courseware and a node for SAP Companion content.  The reason for doing that is that the library structure and the courseware structure will likely be different.  The content structure for SAP Companion content will be different to the structure for the library and courseware so each delivery approach then has its own structure.

The following image shows an example of how you might structure your content:

Standard content is updated on a regular basis, at least new versions are added regularly.  If you modify - Fetch - the standard content in any way, you disconnect your version of the standard content object from the standard.  If you do this, your version of the standard content object is not updated, in the Extended WA, when the SAP author updates their the standard object; it is still updated in the Connected WA.  To get the version of the standard content object to show the latest changes, in the Extended WA,  you must delete the modified version of the standard object in the Extended WA.  This will immediately reset the object to the standard version.  If you want to keep the modified version of the standard object and get the latest version, duplicate the modified version of the object, and then delete the original version.

Hope this helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Negative & Positive Entries Stuck in TR-Zone (922) in LS24 And Can be Confirmed via LT06
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In the process of moving some units of a defective material from a WM to IM sloc via MIGO_TR, we now have a situation where in LS24, we have positive & negative entries of the material stuck in TR_Zone (LT22) and the system won't let us do the confirmation via LT06. We're struggling to understanding why the negative and positive entries are not cancelling out and leaving just the difference. We have checked and there are no existing PCNs. I can see that there are other stock of the same item in LS24 but with different storage types (just additional information in case it matters). 

Can someone please provide some guidance on how to resolve this issue so we can perform the confirmation, get rid of the separate negative and positive entries, so that the transaction can be completed?

Thanks in advance.

Bunie

entry.title: Create Fiori Capability Maturity
entry.content:
Application development as a practice has encountered a lot of changes over the years.Within SAP, the changes have been quite big with the introduction of language components for CDS, Fiori and RAP.Further, the introduction of BTP and changes from NEO into Cloud Foundry are additional considerations.

When I worked to create the Fiori development capability within a large retail chain in Australia, I found that while there was capability within people, the expertise levels and the appetite levels differ greatly.  There were some experts in javascript and Visual Studio, there were experts in ABAP, some with experience in Fiori via WEBIDE and a few full-stack Fiori developers with extensive experience in BTP and BAS.

This provided different ways of attacking the same problems and potential maintenance issues in the future.

In order to establish a common way of working, I dedicated some time for the team to establish :

  • common tooling
  • application deployment standards (manifest, package, versioning, linting)
  • and also collectively study an example viable product (a Fiori app).

The last exercise allowed us a common understanding around expectations on the approach to development since there are a few technical ways to deliver them.  It establishes a common look and feel.  And it provides knowledge uplift for those who were not yet fully up-to-speed.

However, this left us with some artifacts which were in flight prior to the exercise. We had to work hard to convert or minimize issues with them.

The exercise allowed us a next-step maturity level on Fiori application development capability.  It provided a baseline for creating common libraries for specific suites of applications that require the same look and feel. It enabled rapid development with standardized coding artifacts.

entry.title: Re: 咨询S/4 Cloud里面内部订单的使用变化情况
entry.content: KBA: https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2853554 怎么进不去呀

entry.title: Regression - Ways to destroy value
entry.content:
In developing applications, the value we create is associated with the utility of the application created. Sometimes poorly understood, it is also related to the eventual cost of the delivering it.

Let me explain that using a regression example :   I was once working on a new application. It was a report and only limited to a particular activity. The app was using reusable components from an existing area. But I need to extend the reusable component with new functions.

At this point a developer faces a few common questions such as.

  • Will the method of extension create regression testing? Adding a new method to an interface will generally not, but modifying an existing method will require retesting.
  • If an extension requires regression, is the cost of regression within the mandate of the activity? Is it worthwhile?
  • If choosing an option that does not require regression, are you introducing code which is difficult to maintain?

In my example, the business activity is quite small and has a limited tactical value. It was not worth the regression on a whole suite of applications. I decided to extend the component by keeping the original clean, but by doing so, I added another layer - a tactical manager object.

Unfortunately, QA noticed it and orchestrated a refactoring of the original object. This delayed the delivery, hampered the business and incurred massive regression costs.

Within the context of application development, refactoring has the benefits that would increase the general utility / maintainability and productivity of applications. But the cost can include not only the application testing but also any regression of impacted components.

Now, there will be instances where the regression costs are worthwhile. Note that this is a business or investment decision.  Within the context of operating businesses, investments in applications has a cost. Within that investment mindset, an application only makes sense if the overall benefit it generates brings outweighs the overall costs it incurs.  Part of the dissonance in some businesses, is managing these decisions at the appropriate level.

entry.title: How to use XML file in Data Migration
entry.content:
Issue while downloading template from LTMC.

"error on line 2 at column 6: XML declaration allowed only at the start of the document"


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to use XML file in Data Migration
entry.content:
please check this KBA 3444600 - Message "error on line 2 at column 6: XML declaration allowed only at the start of the document" is displayed when opening a XML template file of a Migration Object

=> The XML template file of the Migration Objects should be opened using Microsoft Excel instead of Microsoft Edge.

The Help Portal page and KBAs below help explain how such templates should be filled to maintain their formatting, and thus, correct functionality:

  • Additional Information About XML Template Files
  • 2620588 - How to use Migration Objects template for Data Migration Cockpit
  • 2692715 - Migration Cockpit: How to correctly fill data into XML template

Also this is an issue on Office product, if you are facing the same issue like this time, you may check the following link.

Microsoft Support
Invalid XML declaration

Change default programs in Windows
https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/change-default-programs-in-windows-e5d82cad-17d1-c53b-3505-f10a32e1894d

entry.title: Re: Regression - Ways to destroy value
entry.content: I do recommend the boy scout rule from Robert Martin's Clean Code "Leave code better than when you found it".  But note that there's a caveat - it is generally appropriate to only make small improvements at a time in existing code.

entry.title: Enhancement for transaction VK12
entry.content:
Hi All,

I Create a implicit Enhance at the end of
FORM RV13A_KSCHL_SCHNELL in INCLUDE MV13AF0R,
I want to set the value of field KBSTAT as blocked when conditions change.

I successfully set the field, but normally when KBSTAT is set,
KRFST should also be set, but it is not.

Please Help me! Thanks All !

Best regards,

entry.title: No response when clicking close button on fragement in custom action of UI5 Element
entry.content:
Hi, UI5 Expert ,

I added custom action in object page header .

The UI5 custom action can open a fragment, but when I click the close button close in the fragment, there is no reponse . It seems the fragment still search the function in standard controller of object page .Would you please help me on this ?

webapp/ext/fileHandle/FileHandle.js
 
// sap.ui.define(["sap/ui/core/mvc/ControllerExtension","sap/ui/core/Fragment"
sap.ui.define(["sap/ui/core/Fragment"
], function(Fragment) {
'use strict';

 

return {
pDialog : null,
uploadfiles: function(oEvent) {
if (!this.pDialog) {
Fragment.load({
id: "uploadDialogSet",
name: "freightorderattachmgt.custom.fragment.fileselector",
type: "XML",
controller: this
}).then((oDialog) => {
var oFileUploader = Fragment.byId("uploadDialogSet", "uploadSet");
oFileUploader.removeAllItems();
this.pDialog = oDialog;
this.pDialog.open();
}).catch(error=>alert(error.message));
}else{
var oFileUploader = Fragment.byId("uploadDialogSet", "uploadSet");
oFileUploader.removeAllItems();
this.pDialog.open();

 

}

 

},
onUploadSet: function(oEvent) {
console.log("Upload Button Clicked!!!")

 

alert("upload set triggered");
/* TODO:Call to OData */
},
onCloseDialog: function (oEvent) {
console.log("Close clicked") ;
alert("upload set triggered");
this.pDialog.close();
this.byId("uploadDialogSet--uploadDialogSet").close();
},
onItemRemoved:function (oEvent) {
console.log("File Remove/delete Event Fired!!!")
/* TODO: Clear the already read excel file data */
},
onUploadSetComplete: function (oEvent) {
console.log("File Uploaded!!!")
/* TODO: Read excel file data*/
},
onItemRemoved:function (oEvent) {
console.log("File Remove/delete Event Fired!!!")
/* TODO: Clear the already read excel file data */
}
} });
 
 webapp/manifest.json
{
"_version": "1.59.0",
"sap.app": {
"id": "freightorderattachmgt",
"type": "application",
"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
"applicationVersion": {
"version": "0.0.1"
},
"title": "{{appTitle}}",
"description": "{{appDescription}}",
"resources": "resources.json",
"sourceTemplate": {
"id": "@sap/generator-fiori:lrop",
"version": "1.12.5",
"toolsId": "608a61cb-cb63-43f7-963b-a8d0970324b7"
},
"dataSources": {
"mainService": {
"uri": "/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zfreightorder_srv_bind/srvd/sap/zfreightorder_service/0001/",
"type": "OData",
"settings": {
"annotations": [
"annotation"
],
"localUri": "localService/metadata.xml",
"odataVersion": "4.0"
}
},
"annotation": {
"type": "ODataAnnotation",
"uri": "annotations/annotation.xml",
"settings": {
"localUri": "annotations/annotation.xml"
}
}
},
"crossNavigation": {
"inbounds": {
"FreightOrder-display": {
"semanticObject": "FreightOrder",
"action": "display",
"title": "{{flpTitle}}",
"subTitle": "{{flpSubtitle}}",
"signature": {
"parameters": {},
"additionalParameters": "allowed"
}
}
}
}
},
"sap.ui": {
"technology": "UI5",
"icons": {
"icon": "",
"favIcon": "",
"phone": "",
"phone@2": "",
"tablet": "",
"tablet@2": ""
},
"deviceTypes": {
"desktop": true,
"tablet": true,
"phone": true
}
},
"sap.ui5": {
"flexEnabled": true,
"dependencies": {
"minUI5Version": "1.120.8",
"libs": {
"sap.m": {},
"sap.ui.core": {},
"sap.ushell": {},
"sap.fe.templates": {}
}
},
"contentDensities": {
"compact": true,
"cozy": true
},
"models": {
"i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"settings": {
"bundleName": "freightorderattachmgt.i18n.i18n"
}
},
"": {
"dataSource": "mainService",
"preload": true,
"settings": {
"synchronizationMode": "None",
"operationMode": "Server",
"autoExpandSelect": true,
"earlyRequests": true
}
},
"@i18n": {
"type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
"uri": "i18n/i18n.properties"
}
},
"resources": {
"css": []
},
"routing": {
"routes": [
{
"pattern": ":?query:",
"name": "ZC_FREIGHTORDERList",
"target": "ZC_FREIGHTORDERList"
},
{
"pattern": "ZC_FREIGHTORDER({key}):?query:",
"name": "ZC_FREIGHTORDERObjectPage",
"target": "ZC_FREIGHTORDERObjectPage"
}
],
"targets": {
"ZC_FREIGHTORDERList": {
"type": "Component",
"id": "ZC_FREIGHTORDERList",
"name": "sap.fe.templates.ListReport",
"options": {
"settings": {
"contextPath": "/ZC_FREIGHTORDER",
"variantManagement": "Page",
"navigation": {
"ZC_FREIGHTORDER": {
"detail": {
"route": "ZC_FREIGHTORDERObjectPage"
}
}
}
}
}
},
"ZC_FREIGHTORDERObjectPage": {
"type": "Component",
"id": "ZC_FREIGHTORDERObjectPage",
"name": "sap.fe.templates.ObjectPage",
"options": {
"settings": {
"editableHeaderContent": false,
"contextPath": "/ZC_FREIGHTORDER",
"content": {
"header": {
"actions": {
"FileHandle": {
"press": "freightorderattachmgt.ext.fileHandle.FileHandle.uploadfiles",
"visible": true,
"enabled": true,
"requiresSelection": false,
"text": "UploadFiles",
"position": {
"anchor": "DataFieldForAction::com.sap.gateway.srvd.zfreightorder_service.v0001.uploadfile::com.sap.gateway.srvd.zfreightorder_service.v0001.ZC_FREIGHTORDERType",
"placement": "Before"
}
}
}
}
},
"sectionLayout": "Tabs"
}
}
}
}
},
"extends": {
"extensions": {
"sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
"sap.fe.templates.ObjectPage.ObjectPageController#freightorderattachmgt::ZC_FREIGHTORDERObjectPage": {
"controllerName": "freightorderattachmgt.custom.fragment.fileselector"
}
}
}
}
},
"sap.fiori": {
"registrationIds": [],
"archeType": "transactional"
}
}

entry.title: How to check ACDOCA and ACDOCU tables for S4H system
entry.content:
I can not see any data in the reports, for that I want to look at the table ACDOCU and look the data was upload, but I do not know, how to look at the table like ACDOCU and ACDOCA for compare data.

In S4HANA on Prime we can look at the tables using SE16N but in this version, I do not know, where we can look at the tables.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check ACDOCA and ACDOCU tables for S4H system
entry.content:
For cloud system, you cannot check ACDOCU ACDOCA , these backend table. Backend tables only available for OP system.

You can check your upload data in app Display Group Journal Entries or Group data Analysis.

entry.title: 【Question】About System information for Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear SAP.

I would like to know about System Information for SAP Cloud ALM.

I can see the information about SAP Cloud ALM from SAP for Me: https://me.sap.com/systemsprovisioning/systems

There are four systems with the same name SAP Cloud ALM.

Please tell me why there are 4.

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 【Question】About System information for Cloud ALM
entry.content: These are different services on the SAP Cloud ALM Global Account and Subaccount. It can distinguished by the Cloud Service Name and its data center location.

entry.title: Re: Change processing status and release status in BADI_C...
entry.content:
Hi,

Do you means BADI SD_COND_SAVE_A?

I've also been researching this topic, and I discovered this BADI just check value, it can't set value.(Please correct me if there are any errors.)

I'm now trying implicit enhancement, but there is still some problem.

you can refer to my question link

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/enhancement-for-transaction-vk12/qaq-p/13639022

 Thanks!

entry.title: Re: 【Question】About System information for Cloud ALM
entry.content:
These are different cloud services in the SAP Cloud ALM Global Account and Subaccount.
They can be distinguished by the Service name and the Data center location

entry.content:
Hi,

You should create an implicit enhancement and now you can add FM.

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP Build process automation live content - maintaining decisions
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

We are using SAP Process automation live content in our project. That content brings in a Workflow , UI based applications and decision rules. However, we are facing issues when it comes to maintainence of decision rules:

Whenever we are making modification to decision rules, We have to release the version and once the version reaches for eg : 3.0.X, It does not allow us to release the version further.

Questions that i do have here:

  • Is releasing the version is the correct way of using decision rules for maintaining values of decision for these pre-activated live processes?
  • What can be done if we release a stage as maximum version has reached. I assume decision can be changed N number of times and there should not be a control to stop making new changes.

Can any one tell me if you had faced similar issues and work around way of handling it.

Thanks

Tirthankar

entry.title: Re: Excel Upload using RAP: Part -2
entry.content:
Thanks for this excellent post!

Just for anyone implementing this code. There are two errors in the post which need to be fixed:

1.- Fragment file name must be ExcelUpload.fragment.xml instead of ExcelUpload.fragment.XML (xml extension must be lower case)

2.- The fragment name set in the controller must be pgmsbuildingv2.ext.fragments.ExcelUpload instead of v2.pgms.building.ext.fragment.ExcelUpload

This is the file tree, in case it helps.

entry.title: 3 or more level nested components in Smartedit
entry.content:
A component is linked to a slot, which has a list of nested components (1:N), each of the nested components has one attached (1:1).

For example, in the FAQ section, there is a component responsible for a group of questions and answers, but each of the question-answer pairs is not a terminal component, but a wrapper over CMSParagraph which is in turn the terminal one. As a result, there are three levels of nesting: Group->Wrapper->CMSParagraph. The wrapper has some extra info and supports not only CMSParagraph, but basically any time of components. Not I designed this, but I am seeking how to tame such existing structure.

DIVs are configured properly — in the resulting HTML of the frontend there all levels have their markups, like class="smartEditComponent" data-smartedit-component-id="FiltersContent-faq" data-smartedit-component-uuid="...." data-smartedit-component-type="ContentSlot" data-smartedit-catalog-version-uuid="..../Online" - this is the example for a contentslot, but similar is for the components. In the simpler cases, our markup works fine. The problem is with nested components, 3 levels.

Now, if you open Smartedit with such a setup, the following oddities are observed:

  1. When you hover over a question, the terminal component, which is CMSParagraphComponent, is highlighted. You can edit it, but you also want to be able to edit its parent, which in our case is Wrapper, but there is no link for the parent.
  2. If you try to clone the component, it is created not at the level parallel to the original, but at a higher level, where the slot is.
  3. In the Page Structure, the parent appears not only a level higher but also a level lower. For example, here Accordion is under Alls... although it is actually the parent for Alls..

entry.title: The Substitute of MM50 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Before mass import using the APP Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit’, let’s see the current view of product ‘TT_LQ_01’. The financial view is missing (Valuation Areas are empty) Step 1: Create migration project Now let’s open APP ‘Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit’ , create a migration project via staging tables (from xml file upload) Name the project for example ‘Product - extend’ Scroll down and step 2 will appear. Search for ‘product’ and choose ‘Product – extend existing record by new org levels’, click Review. Tick at least ‘Product’ and click ‘Add’ Now let’s go to maintain migration objects within the newly created project. It might take a while before we can process due to running activities. Step 2: Download template Once ready, tick the ‘Product – extend existing record by new org levels’, on the Action column, 6 steps need to be proceed starting from ‘Download template’ Add the financial view of the project in the excel. Step 3: Upload the xml file and Mapping Tasks The click second step ‘Upload’. It takes a while before the 4th step ‘Mapping Tasks’ shows up. You can select all and click ‘Confirm’ or confirm the items one by one. Step 4: Simulate After that you can proceed with step 5 ‘Simulate’. You may encounter errors and need to go to monitor and check those errors. Mostly because there are still many fields mapping need to be confirmed. Step 5: Migrate After fixing all those errors, you can proceed with ‘Migrate’ and here you can see the final result. We have successfully extended the product with financial view.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to indicate the health of the successi...
entry.content:
Thanks for your question. 

Currently, we cannot provide such a function. However, we are actively working on the GenAI and Joule use cases for SCM, which can meet your request. One of potential use cases is to identify this positions having low bench strength, so that succession planner can be notified to update succession pipeline. We are in the phase of use case collection. 

If you have more requests or use cases, feel free to share with us. Many thanks.

BR,

Beibei

entry.title: The Substitute of MM50 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Many clients asked what is the substitute of MM50 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. They want to mass change material master either certain fields or extending views.

To mass extending views, the answer is APP ‘Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit’ (business role: BR_CONFIG_EXPERT_DATA_MIG). In case any of you are not familiar with this APP, this blog gives detailed step by step procedure in Part 1.

To mass change certain field, we shall use APP ‘Manage Mass Maintenance-products’ in Part 2 with detailed screenshots.

Part 1 APP ‘Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit’

Before mass import using the APP Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit’, let’s see the current view of product ‘TT_LQ_01’. The financial view is missing (Valuation Areas are empty)

Step 1: Create migration project

Now let’s open APP ‘Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit’ , create a migration project via staging tables (from xml file upload)

Name the project for example ‘Product - extend’

Scroll down and step 2 will appear. Search for ‘product’ and choose ‘Product – extend existing record by new org levels’, click Review.

Tick at least ‘Product’ and click ‘Add’

Now let’s go to maintain migration objects within the newly created project.

It might take a while before we can process due to running activities.

Step 2: Download template

Once ready, tick the ‘Product – extend existing record by new org levels’,

on the Action column, 6 steps need to be proceed starting from ‘Download template’

Add the financial view of the project in the excel.

Step 3: Upload the xml file and Mapping Tasks

The click second step ‘Upload’.  It takes a while before the  4th step ‘Mapping Tasks’ shows up.

You can select all and click ‘Confirm’ or confirm the items one by one.

Step 4: Simulate

After that you can proceed with step 5 ‘Simulate’.

You may encounter errors and need to go to monitor and check those errors. Mostly because there are still many fields mapping need to be confirmed.

Step 5: Migrate

After fixing all those errors, you can proceed with ‘Migrate’ and here you can see the final result.

We have successfully extended the product with financial view.

Part 2: APP ‘Manage Mass Maintenance-products’

Before we change the product, the description of product TT_LQ_01 in English is ‘1P9’.

Step 1: Create Process

Step 2: Name the process description and click Save

Step 3: Select the fields you want to change and click ‘OK’ then ‘Continue’.

Step 4: Select multiple materials by filtering material number and language key ‘EN’

After clicking ‘Start’, initializing process begins we can see 3 materials have been selected as unchanged.

Step 5: Edit Records

Click ‘Edit Records’, the items will be displayed, you can switch to ‘Description’ tab

Select All and modify those fields. Then click go back the previous page by clicking the back arrow.

Now you can find 3 changed records and click ‘Continue’

Now let’s see the results:

The features covered in this article are based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2402, please refer to the latest information for changes in subsequent versions.

Hope you LIKE it if it addresses your issue. After that, please feel free to comment after following my account and I will reply ASAP.

More

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement, Public Edition
https://community.sap.com/topics/s4hana-cloud-sourcing-procurement

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Supply Chain, Public Edition
https://community.sap.com/topics/s4hana-cloud-supply-chain

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Manufacturing, Public Edition
https://community.sap.com/topics/s4hana-cloud-manufacturing

entry.title: Re: MM50 in the s4Hana public cloud

In case you are not familiar with this APP, please see the detailed steps in the following blog. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/the-substitute-of-mm50-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13639126

entry.title: Re: Is there an equivalent to Extend Material View App (M...
entry.content: You can use the migration cockpit to mass change material master. In case any of you are not familiar with this APP, please see the detailed steps in the following blog. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/the-substitute-of-mm50-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13639126

entry.title: Re: CCLM オブジェクト一覧「Last Used」日付有LISTCUBEに履歴無
entry.content: It is normal that no all objects in Custom Code Object List can be found from transaction LISTCUBE, cube 0SM_UPL_M or 0SM_UPLMD. LISTCUBE is used by SAP Support to investigate certain issues. For customers, as long as Custom Code Object List shows the objects, the function is working fine. 上記回答をメールにて確認出来ました。 ありがとうございました。

entry.title: Re: Extending Mass Material Master to Purchasing view

entry.title: Monthly Time Sheet UI with Calendar View
entry.content:
I refer to the Preview 1H 2024 session on 5th Mar. One of the enhancement include “Monthly time sheet UI with Calendar View” as shown below.

  1. Can I confirm this UI change will be extended to EC Time-Sheet (we don’t necessarily need Time Tracking) ?
  2. Also, is it possible to build monthly validation with this new functionality in EC Time-Sheet ? E.g. employee can only submit X no. of allowance A per month.

entry.title: pass range value via URL Parameter in SAC
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I am trying to pass range value for a via URL Parameter in SAC. For example, I have a query which model id is "t.1:ABCDEF". There is a variable, which is able to set date, "searchDate". I want to set from "20231201" to "20231231" value in to the variable.

If I wanna pass this information via URL Parameter, how can make it? If you know the solution, I really appreciate it for your kindness. I already check the documentation in SAP Help, but I couldn't find the answer.

(HELP Portal URL)

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/a4406994704e4af5a8559a640b496468/3fa25603111049fba11eb898ccfabbb3.html?locale=en-US

https://<tenant> /<storyID>.../?mode=view&v01Model=t.1:ABCDEF&v01Par=searchDate&v01Val=???

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: ALV_XXL_CALL
entry.content: Could you provide more pieces of code?

entry.title: Re: Object type PROG (SE38) not supported in SAP ABAP Cloud.
entry.content:
Thank you very much Edrilian for the quick reply and the sample program. I ran your program with the Option Run As -> 1. ABAP Application (console) and i am getting the result correctly.

For function Modules, I dont have option to Run As -> 1. ABAP Application (Console). Sample function module Code attached below. Could you please guide me how to execute Function Modules in Eclipse ?

function zfm_operator
  importing
    num1 type string
    num2 type string
    operator type c
  exporting
    sum type string.
if operator = '+'.
sum = num1 + num2.
elseif operator = '-'.
sum = num1 - num2.
elseif operator = '/'.
sum = num1 / num2.
endif.
ENDFUNCTION.

Place for template download can be on Request details block on right of description block.

SAP GRC Access Approver

entry.title: Unlocking the Power of AI in Research Project & Grant Management
entry.content:
In the ever-evolving landscape of academia and research the management of projects and grants stands as a critical pillar supporting innovation and discovery, for the institution, and for society!

As universities and research institutions grapple with the complexities of funding allocation, compliance regulations, governance, and project oversight, the integration of artificial intelligence (AI) emerges as a transformative solution, or better said great opportunity!

AI brings unprecedented capabilities, and opportunities, to, better, streamline and optimize research project and grant management processes. From identifying funding opportunities, and providing better budget management capabilities, to facilitating collaboration among researchers, AI-driven systems offer invaluable support throughout the project lifecycle.

By harnessing the power of machine learning algorithms, these enterprise-grade research project management systems can empower institutions to make, better, informed decisions and maximize the impact of their research endeavors.

To delve deeper into the significance of AI in research management, we invite you to explore two related blogs:

  • "Point Solutions Are Only the Start for AI in Grants and Research" sheds light on the evolving landscape of AI applications in research funding and project management, offering valuable insights into the potential benefits and challenges.

  • "AI Is Making Research Management Systems Imperative" explores how AI-driven research management systems are becoming indispensable tools for academic leaders, providing a roadmap for harnessing AI to drive innovation and excellence in research management.

Visit the following links to dive into the conversation:

Point Solutions Are Only the Start for AI in Grants and Research

AI Is Making Research Management Systems Imperative

Looking forward to your feedback, and, or AI suggestions/examples in the area of research, budget, grant, and projects! 

Thank you!
Rob Jonkers - SAP Higher Education & Research

entry.title: Birthday email not triggering for few employees
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask to trigger birthday mail for employees. So we followed Birthday and Anniversary alerts to the employees in SuccessFactors | SAP Blogs  KBA to replicate the same.

But, For test employees only birthday mail is triggering on their birthday but for real time employees it is not triggering. For example- Test rubina(employee id-1)'s  & HI7173's birthday is on 17 january. But the birthday mail is triggering to Rubina where for HI7173 it is not triggering.

Attaching the replication steps. 

Replication steps-

Create an MDF object named 'cust_birthday'.

 

 

Birthday rule

 

 

Alert MDF Birthday rule

 

 

Birthday WF

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Alert message birthday

 

 

Integration

 

Please check. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Correct usage of SBO_Application.RemoveWindowsMessage
entry.content:
I am trying to optimize reading of a UI grid that has a large number of rows. This grid is a user defined grid on a user defined form used in a UI Addon om Business One V 10 hana.

I have over a 10,000 rows that I need to process however looping through them crashes the entire addon roughly every  100 rows.

Note that there are no updates done to the grid or the data table behind that grid during the loop. Only reading.

It has been suggested that this issue may relate to the issue noted on SAP note  below even though I don't directly get the same error message. SAP note contents are appended below too.

Can someone explain the correct usage of the 2nd solution given in the note please - the usage of

SBO_Application.RemoveWindowsMessage 

 

<< 1506163 - UI_UI API break down with RPC error>>

==================================================

Symptom

Your add-on is running long-time operations, also the UI API keeps sending events to this add-on. After the long-time operation is done, you may get the error:

Exception: System.InvalidCastException: Unable to cast COM object of type 'SAPbouiCOM.ApplicationClass' to interface
type 'SAPbouiCOM.IApplication'. This operation failed because the QueryInterface call on the COM component for the interface with
IID '{D1F75D47-137C-4335-AC2A-3FE209831B6A}' failed due to the following error: System call failed. (Exception from HRESULT: 0x80010100 (RPC_E_SYS_CALL_FAILED)).

Cause

Limitation

Solution

Workaround

Set the key HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Windows\“USERPostMessageLimit” in regedit. Make this key large enough like 400,000

Or you can use the RemoveWindowsMessage method which is exposed in 8.82 like this:

System.Threading.Thread.Sleep(1000 * 60);    //replace with your real working code  
SBO_Application.RemoveWindowsMessage(SAPbouiCOM.BoWindowsMessageType.bo_WM_TIMER, true); 

This method enables you to deal with extreme scenarios. When an add-on needs to take a long time to process a UI API event, it prevents SAP Business One from processing the Windows message queue.

Other terms

RPC Call, Thread, SDK, synchronous, asynchronous

02) If I can create custom content in the Learning tab, what could be wrong when I click on the Edit icon and no further action is possible.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Cost Center on Asset Acquisition credit
entry.content:
There’s proposal that details steps are as below.

Example data:

  • Company code: 1310.
  • Supplier account: 1000122, reconciliation account is 21100000.
  • Asset Capitalization Clearing (Expense) GL Account: 61003000.
  • Cost center 13101101
  • Asset master data: 500019-0

Process steps:

  1. Create supplier invoice for Account payable with APP “Create Supplier invoice”, and the result is as below.

2. Create new asset master data.

 

3. Post the asset acquisition via app “Clear outgoing Payment-Manual Clearing”.

 

 

4. Check post asset acquisition value in asset master data.

5. Check the report for GL account “61003000” line items as below.

6. Clear GL account “61003000” if it’s needed.

entry.title: Re: Grpo qty is greater than Po qty in sap b1 hana Validation
entry.content: ok

entry.title: Re: (SAP Companion) Edit Mode not working in Learning?
entry.content:
Hi,

Question 1 - None.  The Learning tab is used to display eLearning content, such as Simulations, Book Pages, and Media Objects, e.g. PDF documents, hosted in Enable Now Manager.  You must create this content using the Manager Web Editor, Producer, or Instant Producer.  You can also record Simulations directly into Manager, using the nice new Simulation recorder

Question 2 - Nothing is wrong, you cannot create content in the Learning tab through SAP Companion.  You can get your own content to appear in the Learning Center.  The following rules must be correct for an object in Manager to appear in the Learning Center:

1. The content object must be int he correct WA in Manager and published
2. The content object must have the same Language as the application interface that you are viewing; although content does also appear for fallback languages if content is not available in your primary language.  By default, the fallback language for SAP Companion is US English
3. The content must have the same Product Name and Product Version as your application, e.g.

When you record Simulations, using Producer, Instant Producer, or the new Manager Simulation recorder, the Product Name and Product Version details are automatically added to the content.  The Context of the screens that have been recorded are also automatically added.

If you want to link non-system content, such as Book Pages to an application screen, you must do that linking manually, or using the recording functionality in Producer.

 Hope that helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: No response when clicking close button on fragement in custom action of UI5 Element
entry.content: Hi, UI5 Expert, The previous error in screen shot is coursed by a controller extension. If I comment override the in controller extension, this error will disappear.

entry.title: How we can use SAP MII BLS as an API in Custom UI Plugin in SAP Digital manufacturing?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am working on a Custom UI plugin which is having some table columns. 

I want to consume SAP MII BLS transaction as an API in Custom UI plugin in SAP Digital Manufacturing.

is there any possibility to consume imported SAP MII BLS transaction in Digital manufacturing custom plugin?

 

Thanks in Advance 

Regards, 
Utkarsh Raj

entry.title: Attach Rate Planning in IBP
entry.content:
Attach rate planning is typically done to find component (or a secondary product's) demand based on header (primary product's) demand. While in some cases, you have a static BOM (Bill of Material) relation between the header and component, there could be Configurable Materials (KMATs) which do not have a static BOM. In those cases, you have to generate a BOM based on historical sales/production data.

Note: Just to clarify, by static BOM here, I mean that the ratio of input to output components is fixed.

Below I am going to describe a specific case for a client that I worked for. This is not the most complicated case and does not cover all aspects of possible requirements around attach rate planning but will give you a flavor of a possible solution around it.

Requirement: To find the gross requirement for components which are secondaries for several type of primary products, such as-

  1. MTS/MTO Items which have a static BOM relation with the components.
  2. Configurable materials which did not have a static BOM (so, for these materials, the BOM would vary from one sales order to another).

Another point to consider was that these configurable materials were not forecasted at individual level, but at an aggregated level. Fictional Materials (called HBOMs) were created to aggregate shipment history from configurable materials (falling withing the same Product Hierarchy and Brand- which were both product attributes) and then forecast/demand was generated at the HBOM level.

Attach Rate Calculation

To calculate attach rates & gross demand for component we needed two things-

  1. Demand for the fictional HBOM Material and that was available from the demand planning module of IBP (demand planning was a straightforward process where the history data for all configurable materials within a HBOM was aggregated and then statistical models were run to generate statistical forecast for the HBOM material).
  2. The BOM relation between HBOM and components: Since, there was no fixed relation between the configurable materials and components, we had to calculate that relation (or the attach rate) somehow as this was not available as Master data in source (ECC).

For the second point, we had to perform the below steps to generate the BOM between the HBOM and the corresponding components:

  • Read all production orders for all the configurable materials which fall under a particular HBOM. Aggregate all good receipts- (say movement type 101, 102) in a month for all configurable materials that were produced (of course UOM conversions have to be accounted for) and thus get the aggregated Production quantity for the HBOM in that month.
  • Get all components issued against those production orders, read the good issue quantity (say movement type 261, 262), and thus for every HBOM, get a consumption history of the components.

  • Apart from getting the Production quantity for HBOM and consumption quantity for corresponding components, we used the above to also create Production Source Header and Production Source Item Master data. Any component which was issued even once to any of the configurable materials under the HBOM gets added to the PSI for the corresponding HBOM. We do not update any static component coefficient in the Production Source Item Master data as that gets updated in a time varying way using attach rates.

  • Current month’s attach rates for every component are then calculated dividing the Sum of consumption history for the last 6 months for the component by Sum of production history for the last 6 months for the HBOM.

  • Once the attach rates are calculated (and finalized), copy it to the standard Component Coefficient Key Figure. Now, we have both: the demand coming for the HBOM (copied to the standard Independent Demand key figure) and the component coefficient created for the BOM items.

  • Run SOP Heuristics (infinite Heuristics) to propagate the demand from the header to the component. If these components are also a part of MTS/MTO (which have a static BOM), that gets aggregated in the Gross demand.

Note: We also considered doing this using Demand Planning module (DP BOM kind of functionality using Attribute transformations), but this approach of using S&OP Heuristics ended up being the simplest in our case.

There are other functionalities that you can use with SOP Heuristics- Validities, substitution etc. which we are using as well however they are easy to understand and use standard functionalities.

Hope this was helpful! Thanks.

entry.title: CVI_BDT_ADAPTER:012 Error on SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guys,

I have successfully implementated a Business Partner (BP) functionality on SAP ECC system.

Here, This functionality converts 'Vendor' & 'Customer' to 'Business Partner' accordingly.

(On SAP ECC system only).

Initially everything was coreect, going smoothly. but later we observed that for vendor master generated 'Business Partner' is not able to display the 'Company code' (FLVN00) as well as 'Purchasing Org.' level data. (FLVN01) We are getting below error message.

E:CVI_BDT_ADAPTER:012
As per error message we have checked all the internal possible soultion to resolve this issue but still we are not able to find the root cause.

Please note, Same functionality is working fine for 'Customer Master'.

Can anybodey help me here to solve this issue.

Thanks in advance for support.

Thanks,

Rohit Kuthiye

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing and SAP MII integration
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,
 
I have few Questions related to SAP Digital Manufacturing and SAP MII integration 
 
Scenario
If any customer has already SAP MII Now they want to move in Digital Manufacturing.
If DM is Connected to MII using Web servers and able to import (in Service registry) BLS Web files in DM.
Customer wants to use the existing BLS/UI of MII in DM.
 
Questions-
1. Can we use SAP MII Existing (BLS and UI) KPI and Reports in DM?
2. We have register some BLS in Service registry in DM can we use that in Embedded SAC? 
3. Data is stored in MII DB and Customer wants to use their old data in DM, how we can access those DB tables?
 
Thanks in Advance !!
 
Regards,
Utkarsh Raj

entry.title: CSRF Token Validation Error
entry.content:
Hello fellow developers,

recently we ran into an issue which we gave us a very hard time.

Scenario

A UI5 application runs in the #SAP Workzone Standard Edition# and uses the SAP Managed Approuter to connect to the workflow runtime servie as well as a backend SAP Gateway destination with principal propagation.
Everything worked fine in regards to the workflow requests as well as the GET requests to the Gateway system. What did not work were any requests that required a valid CSRF Token, like POST or UPDATE. 
The app did sent requests with a valid CSRF token to the backend, but the system refused to accept it. 

The app worked like this: When it is opened with a certain URL, the app loads some information from the workflow runtime and needs a CSRF token for this. The xs-app.json looked like this:

You can see the route for the workflow runtime as well as the SAP Gateway System and its destination. It was set up just like you would expect to find this on any tutorial.

Solution

We had to set the csrfProtection to false for the SAP Gateway destination.

With this settings the csrf token for the ODataModel was then issued by the SAP Gateway.

entry.title: need suggetion for upgrade HANA version
entry.content:
Hi experts,

  We are using S4HANA ON PREMISE SAP S/4HANA 1809 and datebase  2.00.037.07.1595989006 ( fa/hana2sp03 ) , detail can be found in the screenshot. Currently, we are experiencing the issue mentioned in  NOTE 0002940750 - Column Store DML Statements Waiting for DeltaDataObjectAppendRollover Lock. It seems the better solution is to upgrade HANA database version to 2.054.00 (SPS05) or higher. 

  Our concern here is that the current version of HANA has already reached SPS07, with many versions in between. Which version would be the best choice or the most stable option for us this time? Additionally, if we only upgrade the database without upgrading S/4HANA, will there be any compatibility issues? We hope the experts can provide some advice.

  Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Components Wizard install never starts after c...
entry.content:
I ran into the same problem. Some components simply refuse to start the installation on new VM.

Finally solved the problem. It is the same issue we had in the past when setting up the SAP Client, and after install there were no DB server and no company available. 

We run SBO on SQL Server 2017. According to Adminguide on machines running the Client or B1 services, MS ODBC driver 13 is required for MSSQL 2016 and 2017. Even tough that is installed, the client or services or addons don’t work or even will not install at all, because of connection issues. See the windows event log, connection issues, unfortunately without the cause, so you can only guess.

I just can recommend installing „Microsoft SQL Server 2012 Native Client“ - solved the majority of issues with SBO, and once more this driver was key to get that stalling Component Wizard setup working on new VM for WebClient.

Still unclear why that SQL Client is the culprit. We run latest Windows Server OS, Windows 10, all full patched and x64. This issue regularly shows up and I have marked it in handout as first possible solution. 
Maybe this will help other people keep their hair and mind.

entry.title: Application for Digital Skills Initative
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

I would like to apply for Digital Skills Iniative so I am starting a discussion to show my interest in the program. I just started my SAP career for around 1 year and I really love it. Now I found that if I have a certification, it will be one of my advantages as a women in competitive labor market. In addition, I'm a first-generation college student, leading to strong support from my family to my education and career, so that I have strong aspirations to seize any opportunity to develop myselft and be better.

I would be very lucky if I have opportunity to join in this program. I will trully appreciate that.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Data action is taking long to execute
entry.content:
Hi, I just had a question on how I can make my data action execute faster. 

As you can see my data actions are taking abnormally long and my data action is just a simple copy step and a advanced formula step that simply has a delete attached to it. 

Is there any way to speed up the process and make it run faster?

Thank you! Ammar

entry.title: Change /PLMU/WDC_RFO table column property 'Read-Only' dynamically
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I am stuck with a strange issue in the standard WD /PLMU/WDC_RFO.
The requirement is to enhance the View - V_ITEM_TABLE and change the property of Item and Specification columns to 'read only'.

In the view layout, the UI element of the table column had read-only property binding as 'Bind to the property of the selected attribute'.

In the post-exit of method WDDOMODIFYVIEW, I've used the
CALL METHOD lo_element->set_attribute_property

EXPORTING

attribute_name = 'POSNR'

property = if_wd_context_element=>e_property-read_only

value = 'X'.


The issue with this is that the code is working as expected except for the very first time when the view is loaded.

Any suggestions would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Rics

entry.title: Can recognize # as one of combination of CR?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We implemented Characteristic Relationship - Create method using Exit Class.

But a problem has occurred.

ADSO 1 (combination is here) has # as one of fields member.

Then, Query recognize that one as "All Combination of Master Data" (I think...)

If it worked, the result combination will be 150,

but because of the field (which has #, one of member), the result combination is 210,000...

 

some blog says the buffer logic on create method can fix this situation, but i don't know how to implement it...

entry.title: PR Generated For Obsolete Materials
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have scenario, where we have two materials and both have status of obsolete. These are externally procured material with Procurement type as 'F' and having the MRP type as 'PD' and lot size as Period lot size. We have maintained minimum lot size as 1620000 and rounding value as 1620000 for both materials. When we run MRP Live for the plant with planning mode as '3' 'delete and recreate' it creates the PR for one material with quantity 1620000 an for other its not creating any PR. I have checked master data for both materials and its exactly same, still why system is behaving like this. Can you provide details what other things I have to check.

Pls suggest the options other than ND MRP type.

@SAPSupport @Caetano

entry.title: Re: Object type PROG (SE38) not supported in SAP ABAP Cloud.
entry.content: Classes.

entry.title: Re: Help editing this query to allow for filtering by OIT...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please try this:

SELECT IG.ItmsGrpNam, IW.ItemCode, IM.ItemName, IW.WhsCode, ISNULL(IW.OnHand,0) AS 'OnHand', NULL AS 'Batch', NULL AS 'InDate'
FROM OITW IW
    INNER JOIN OITM IM ON IW.ItemCode = IM.ItemCode AND IM.InvntItem = 'Y' AND IM.ManBtchNum = 'N' AND IM.validFor = 'Y'
	INNER JOIN OITB IG ON IM.ItmsGrpCod = IG.ItmsGrpCod
WHERE IM.validFor = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT IG.ItmsGrpNam,IW.ItemCode, IM.ItemName, IW.WhsCode, ISNULL(BQ.Quantity,0) AS 'OnHand', BN.DistNumber AS 'Batch', BN.InDate
FROM OITW IW
    INNER JOIN OITM IM ON IW.ItemCode = IM.ItemCode AND IM.InvntItem = 'Y' AND IM.ManBtchNum = 'Y'
    INNER JOIN OITB IG ON IM.ItmsGrpCod = IG.ItmsGrpCod
    LEFT OUTER JOIN OBTQ BQ ON IW.ItemCode = BQ.ItemCode AND BQ.WhsCode = IW.WhsCode
    LEFT OUTER JOIN OBTN BN ON BQ.MdAbsEntry = BN.AbsEntry
WHERE ISNULL(BQ.Quantity,0) <> 0
  AND IM.validFor = 'Y'

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Promises in ABAP - like in Javascript
entry.content: You can't find "promise" in ABAP, but you can find "asynchronous". Just search.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to create variants for the job that releases changes from the Maint to Prod branc
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere – New Replication Flow
entry.content:
don't you miss Kafka as potential target as described in this blog ?
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-replication-flows-blog-series-part-3-integration-with-kafka/ba-p/13580350

entry.title: Re: View Cluster Help
entry.content: If you don't give details, we can only generically answer: the message "enter a valid value" means that the ABAP validation for the field has failed, and you must find by yourself why it fails (because you didn't give any indication).

entry.title: Re: Data action is taking long to execute
entry.content:
@ahfadoo 

In Both Copy and Delete step, you should narrow down the scope to exactly the data you want to copy and delete by defining MEMBERSET for each dimension. Writing an open ended logic will force system to query too much records. Either use the graphical view to set the filters or script view and write MEMBERSET.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Change value of fields of an internal table without loop
entry.content:
Do you think that a constructor expression has better performance?

That's a wrong assertion. The goal of constructor expressions is to clarify the ABAP code.

entry.title: Re: Import of the SAP Best Practices of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023 into SOLADM?

entry.title: Re: Change value of fields of an internal table without loop
entry.content: Sorry but I didn’t understand you wrote.

entry.title: Re: Conversion of XML to JSON using Generic Java Mapping
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have used your code and it works perfectly if there are more than 1 data however, if there is only 1 data passed, it does not produce a bracket []. Would you help me fix this? 

Sample: 

 

2 data - working - with bracket []

[
{
"parentImportKey": "ABC",
"responsibleOfficerImportKey": "ABC",
"description": "ABC",
"active": true,
"importKey": "ABC"
},
{
"parentImportKey": "DEF",
"responsibleOfficerImportKey": "DEF",
"description": "DEF",
"active": false,
"importKey": "DEF"
}
]

 

1 data - not working - without bracket []

{
"parentImportKey": "ABC",
"responsibleOfficerImportKey": "ABC",
"description": "ABC",
"active": true,
"importKey": "ABC"
}

entry.title: Change auto reply text sent from report AI_SDK_SP_AUTO_CLOSE in incident in ITSM
entry.content:
Change auto reply text sent from report  AI_SDK_SP_AUTO_CLOSE in incident in ITSM
We do not want to display the program name to the users.
Current text is as below:
************************************************************************
Message automatically processed by report "AI_SDK_SP_AUTO_CLOSE".
 
New user status:  &&'Closed'(E0008)&&
 
************************************************************************


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change auto reply text sent from report AI_SDK_SP_AUT...
entry.content:
that's the default standard text for report AI_SDK_SP_AUTO_CLOSE, if you need different texts, either customization or consulting service is needed.

Below documents for your reference:

KBA: ##1654653

https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-sap/solman-set-up-automatic-confirmation-changing-user-status-of-messages-using/ba-p/12914474

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hi PierreB,

I was trying to set-up the B2B Quotes using the composable storefront 2211.20. When I was trying to add the schematics using 'ng add@spartacus/quote' , I am getting the below error: 

✖ Unable to load package information from registry: 404 Not Found - GET https://<license_num>.npmsrv.base.repositories.cloud.sap/@spartacus%2fquote - Package '@spartacus/quote' not found.

Note:I have a valid license
Could you please help? 

Regards,

Dinesh A

entry.title: Freight Charges Missing in Purchase Order Output/XML (S/4 HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Requirement: I Need to send freight charges (Condition Type FVA1) from the S/4 HANA cloud, public edition to a legacy system through EDI. 

Done up to: I am able to populate the required condition for freight charges (FVA1) in the purchase order document condition table by assigning the access sequence. 

Issue: When the output is triggered (channel EDI) the XML do not show the freight charges and only shows the net value. Expectation is to have a separate line for freight charges on the xml file.

Please suggest the solution.

 

Regards,

Gagan Saratkar

entry.title: Re: What is diffrence beween SAP HANA and SAP Native Hana...
entry.content:
SAP HANA is a high-performance, in-memory database system, used for real-time analytics and applications.

SAP Native HANA, refers to a development method where the application is built and runs directly on the HANA database to fully leverage its capabilities.

So, SAP HANA is the database, while SAP Native HANA is a development approach using this database.

entry.title: Can one shipment document create two shipment cost document?
entry.content: hi to all ! Can one shipment document create two shipment cost document? Because the shipment include shipment fee and loading fee.They are beyond two venders.

entry.title: Cross Company Payment in ByDesign ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I would like to know that , Do we have any cross company payment in SAP ByDesign ?

Its like similar to ECC functionality, in which Payment run at CoCd 1 will be execute by CoCd 2.

Do anyone has came across with the similar requirement.

Do we also have any workaround in ByDesign for this ?

entry.title: How to record in GRN if some excess Qty is received over and above Invoice Qty.
Dynamically print PO line items and respective service items in smart forms
entry.content:
Hi all,

In smart form PO I need to print line items and below this service items. I have a table which I am using to print line items one below the other, but how to print service items below each line items?

please suggest.

entry.title: Re: OS/DB Migration
entry.content:
Hi Tammy,

 

So you suggest upskilling in S/4HANA conversion(migration) rather than simply OS/DB migration? I am not sure why companies are still looking out for expertise in OS/DB migration area. Please pour in your thoughts here.

Also, kindly share link of open.sap courses that you are referring to?

entry.title: SAP MII Custom table data (MDO) archiving
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

This is with respect to the archiving of custom data tables(MDO's) created in SAP MII.

Scenario - we have custom data table (MDO's) created to store the transactional data in SAP MII. now in production as the data is growing/increasing , users are facing the performance issues while using the SAP MII. also they are not able to perform there day to day activity with SAP MII.

Please note that underlaying database of SAP MII is HANA DB where all the custom tables are getting created.

Requirement - we wanted to check if there is any way in SAP MII or any SAP provided tool to archive the custom data table (MDO's) created to store the transactional data in SAP MII.

any help/ supporting guide/ relevance answer will be appreciated.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Re: SAP IDM/SAC Support for SAC roles and TEAM liaison in...
entry.content:
Not a direct answer to your question, but have you looked at @Matthew_Shaw 's GitHub repository containing SAC SCIM API sample scripts? It looks like a pretty comprehensive resource for all questions user/teams/license management in SAC via REST. Check the links below:

  • https://github.com/SAP-samples/analytics-cloud-scim-api-samples/tree/main
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-user-and-team-provisioning-scim-api-sample-scripts/ba-p/13572651

entry.title: Re: Material Number range to be increased to 40CHAR
entry.content: HI Rashid Khan. Looking for your responce for above comment.

entry.title: Apply caching for CAP Project for certain entity endpoint
entry.content:
Is there a way we can apply caching for certain endpoint in a CAP NodeJS Project?

For example, I have some entity that rarely change, so it kind of a waste if we keep calling it to the Database, I can apply some custom handler to handle OnRead to work with that, but it will be great if CAP have a way to define the caching for each entity.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Hub - successor ?
entry.content: Thanks : )

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Date Filter Issue in a Story Based on Live Co...
entry.content: Hi akhilgs,
